text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, now I've done it... After I warmed up and
everything!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
No! Not much, at least. The injury itself is only
minor...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid of getting out of shape, so I really want
to get back to training, but... Hmmm.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay, Trainer... Time for a pop quiz! Ready?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Which of the following is our best course of
action right now?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
One: do some light running. Two: do a casual
workout. Three: do some water aerobics to avoid
muscle strain!
choice_data_list: ...I get it. We can try to get back to training.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Trainer! That's cheating! There is no number four!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her that there is some logic to what
she's saying, but that I think she'd benefit much
more from a thorough rest.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I see. Well, if that's your reasoning, I accept.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit of an emotional blow... but I'll take a
nice long rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so Fine Motion does as I recommend and
prioritizes rest and recuperation.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! ♪ When it comes to small injuries, it's
best to get your body moving, right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I think... I might have misjudged things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion smiles through her disappointment
and commits to getting the recuperation she
needs.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Okay, shall we head right to the training track,
then? ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
choice_data_list: Looks like you're good to go.
Looks like you're good to go.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
See, I told you exercise was for the best. ♪ Let's
keep this up within reason!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Fine Motion eases herself back into
training.
